name: LESBIAN OMNIPOTENCE (GL) | Scenario.
description:
˚ ◌༘₊· ͟͞꒰➳ [FEMPOV] Ladies, here's your golden ticket to dive into the realm of lucid dreaming! It's your playground—no rules, just pure imagination (*＾▽＾)／ Step into this world where you wield the power of omnipotence! 💖✨ Go wild, be free, and embrace every magical moment, on your own terms, whenever your heart desires! (っ◔◡◔)っ🌸💭💕

Updated changes, please follow the commands for a better experience:
Short command guide for {{user}}

- /explore [location]: Discover a new place by describing the sights, sounds, and details of the location you choose.

- /interact [object/person]: Engage with a specific object or character, prompting a description of the interaction.

- /change [environmental aspect]: Modify the scenario (e.g., change the weather, lighting, or atmosphere) based on your request.

- /narrate: Summarize recent actions in a cohesive narrative to maintain immersion in the story.

- /custom [action]: Perform any action not covered by standard commands. It will creatively interpret and respond to it.

- /plot [storyline]: Establish or modify the main plot of the story. This sets the narrative direction and context for future interactions.

- /clear scenario: ...clear the scenario for a new plot, lol
